message:
chore: audit batch 506 — 18 files across security/correctness fixes

Diff audit of commits 1c63ae39, cb375e77, 6a3aa899, 31b854a9, 2f063379:
- Security: SCRAM constant-time, TLS root store, DNS alloc cap, gRPC status,
  chunk-size whitespace, HPACK table overflow, EXP3 weight clamping
- Correctness: zombie process, obligation conflict ordering, backoff ordering,
  NaN guards, OOB bounds, buffer caps, supervision ordering, close semantics
All 18 files SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
